## Summary
Can cosmological observations determine the absolute neutrino mass scale? Current bounds approach the oscillation minimum (~0.06 eV).

## Evidence
Planck + DESI BAO yield Σmν < 0.072 eV (95% CL), tentatively disfavoring the inverted hierarchy.

## Significance
The neutrino mass–dark energy degeneracy is a critical systematic. A cosmological detection would bridge particle physics and cosmology.
